title: Nurture Life: A Healthy, Kid-Friendly Subscription Meal Service
excerpt: This post is in collaboration with Nurture Life; all ideas and opinions are my own. As always, my creative partners and I appreciate the support. As a working mom with a new baby and a new home, there’s a lot…
body:
This post is in collaboration with Nurture Life; all ideas and opinions are my own. As always, my creative partners and I appreciate the support.

As a working mom with a new baby and a new home, there’s a lot to juggle - between virtual school for Jack, caring for Juniper, online furniture shopping, meetings with contractors, work projects and the list goes on!

Don’t get me wrong, I’m so thankful for the life I have, and I know many of you can relate with the multi-tasking and shifting these days.

   

I’m always on the lookout for time-saving solutions so I can get the most out of each day and spend more time crafting a life I love with the people I love. Mealtimes are one such area! Thankfully, JC loves to cook for our family on weekends and some weeknight dinners, but there are times when it’s been especially hectic and we are too late on ordering take out.

On such days, it’s such a relief to be able to pull out a healthy, delicious meal that’s ready to go in minutes, like the kid-friendly meals from Nurture Life! 

Nurture Life is a subscription meal service for kids that’s delivered right to your door! There are so many reasons I’m impressed with Nurture Life:

  • The meals are prepared with real, clean ingredients like organic veggies and antibiotic-free proteins.

  • Nurture Life’s team of registered dietitians and chefs develop the meals so you know your child is getting the right amount of nutrients in a serving size for their age.

  • The meals are freshly made, never frozen and are delivered to your door in refrigerated packaging (100% recyclable and the liner is made from recycled bottles!).

  • Nurture Life was co-founded by a mom who wanted to provide healthy mealtime solutions for other busy parents. I love supporting women-owned businesses!

  • Their flexible subscription service makes it easy to choose the type and number of meals from their extensive menu delivered to you each week and you can skip, pause or cancel at any time.

The best thing about Nurture Life is that their meals aren’t just for kids, but there are options for babies, toddlers and teens and adults too! Our whole family can enjoy delicious, nutritious meal times together. And Nurture Life meals grow with your child; I’m looking forward to letting Juniper try a baby meal once she’s ready!

One of our favorite Nurture Life meals has to be the Mac & Cheese with Butternut Squash and Turkey Meatloaf with Mashed Potatoes & Green Beans.

I also love the additional options they have for portable meals which are meant to be eaten cold and shareable meals that can be eaten family style. The Mushroom Truffle Ravioli is insanely delicious - my mom was convinced we had gotten it from a restaurant.

If you’re a busy parent looking for convenient kid-friendly meals without sacrificing nutrition or taste, check out Nurture Life. Right now you can save 50% off your first two orders of Nurture Life meals with code AMYTANGERINE.

If you do try out Nurture Life, be sure to let me know!
